hypotheses.name: Drift target identification — B-cell centroid at L11
hypotheses.method: Load cycle1 embeddings [12,4803,512]. Compute B-cell centroid (MS4A1, CD19, CD79A, BLK, PRDM1; n=5 in-vocab) at L0 and L11. Find top-20 genes nearest to bc_L11 in L11 embedding space (excluding anchor). Report cosine alignment of L0→L11 drift vector with L0→top_gene direction vectors.
hypotheses.primary_metric: rank of GC-TFs among top-20 nearest genes to B-cell centroid at L11
hypotheses.result_value: BATF rank=2 (dist=2.360), SPIB rank=5 (dist=2.454) among 195 in-vocab genes
hypotheses.next_action: Compute full centroid trajectory for extended GC cluster (BCL6, PAX5) in cycle4 to confirm they also converge toward bc_L11

hypotheses.name: Extended plasma panel + BCL6/PAX5 GC screen (cycle4_immune, clean anchor)
hypotheses.method: cycle4_immune embeddings [12,4941,512], 295 in-vocab genes. B-cell anchor (plasma-exclusive): MS4A1, CD79A, BLK. Extended GC panel: BATF, BACH2, BCL6, PAX5. Plasma panel: JCHAIN, SDC1. Z-score mean distance to anchor centroid at L0,L2,L5,L8,L11 using 200-permutation null (random same-size gene sets). Spearman rho for layer-trend.
hypotheses.primary_metric: Spearman rho of plasma z-score across layers (monotonic divergence test)
hypotheses.result_value: Plasma z rho=+1.000 (monotonically increasing); GC z rho=-0.800; plasma z L0=-1.35 -> L11=-0.81; GC z L0=-1.05 -> L11=-1.62; divergence confirmed but plasma never z>0
hypotheses.next_action: Accept relative divergence as the reliable finding; retire the 'plasma goes z>0' claim (PRDM1 artifact). Report BCL6/PAX5 confirmed in GC cluster. Check IRF4 availability in cycle4 for plasma-side enrichment.

hypotheses.name: LOO ablation of B-cell anchor genes on GC-TF proximity precision@10
hypotheses.method: cycle1 main embeddings at L2 and L11. Full panel {MS4A1, CD19, CD79A, BLK, PRDM1} precision@10 for GC-TFs {BATF, SPIB, BACH2}. LOO: remove each anchor gene, recompute precision@10 and z-score (200-perm null). Null comparison: 200 random 4-gene panels, record p@10 distribution.
hypotheses.primary_metric: delta precision@10 per removed gene vs full panel
hypotheses.result_value: Full p@10=0.200 at L2 (99.5th pctile) and L11 (100th pctile). CD19 removal: p@10=0.100 at BOTH layers (-50%). BLK removal: p@10=0.100 at L11 (-50%). MS4A1/CD79A/PRDM1 removal: no p@10 change.
hypotheses.next_action: Verify CD19/BLK criticality in cycle4_immune (different cell type composition). Use CD19+BLK as minimal 2-gene anchor for future precision tests.
